## Describe your changes

<!--
  Please provide a clear and concise description of what you have changed.

## Issue ticket number and link

<!--
  If this PR fixes an existing issue, please link it here. (e.g. "Fixes #123")
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist before requesting a review

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have formatted my code (C++ with clang-format, TS with Biome/Prettier).
- [ ] I have run tests (`bun test`) and they pass locally.
- [ ] If it is a core feature, I have added thorough tests.
